description_long: This is a rectangular grocery bag with a structured, boxy shape and a flat base, designed for carrying items. The bag features a prominent blue patterned fabric panel on its main sides, bordered by off-white material at the top, bottom, and sides. Two long, sturdy loop handles extend from the top edges, allowing for easy hand or shoulder carrying. The interior appears spacious and open, suitable for holding groceries or other personal items. The bag's construction suggests a combination of textile and possibly synthetic materials for durability. No visible branding or logos are present, but the blue pattern gives it a distinctive, decorative appearance.
description: A rectangular grocery bag with blue patterned panels, off-white borders, and long loop handles, designed for carrying items. The bag is open and spacious, with a decorative yet functional look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue patterned panel bordered by off-white material and both loop handles visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the bag, with the patterned fabric running vertically and one handle visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the blue patterned panel and both handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and vertical patterned fabric with one handle.
